differential_diagnoses: Nephrotic syndrome (secondary to membranous nephropathy or other glomerulopathy)
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
next_steps: Kidney biopsy with Congo red staining, immunofluorescence, and electron microscopy
Echocardiography with strain imaging to evaluate for amyloid infiltration
Bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with Congo red staining and clonality assessment
Serum free light chain ratio monitoring
